title: Flood Alert
message: Heavy rain expected. Evacuate to higher ground.
instructions: Avoid walking or driving through flood water
Turn off electrical mains if safe to do so

title: Fire Alert
instructions: Cover nose and mouth to avoid smoke inhalation
Stay low if smoke is present

title: Earthquake Drill
message: Simulated earthquake. Drop, cover, and hold on.
instructions: Move to an open area after the shaking
